zh.lifeSummary: 當Aubrey de Lisours於1128年出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯時，她的父親Robert Lisours31歲，母親Albreda de Lacy31歲。她和Richard fitz Eustace至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1194年4月21日在英國越可爾斯吉普頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國越可爾斯吉普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aubrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

variants.name: Aubree
meanings: From a Norman French form of the Germanic name Alberic, from alb ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ric ‘power’. This was the name, according to Germanic mythology, of the king of the elves. The native Old English form, Ælfrīc, borne by a 10th-century archbishop of Canterbury, did not long survive the Conquest. Aubrey was a relatively common given name during the Middle Ages, but later fell out of favour. Its occurrence since the 19th century may in part represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman given name, as well as a revival of the latter. In the United States, this is mainly used as a girl's name, perhaps under the influence of Audrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Aubrey de Lisours was born in 1128, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Lisours, was 31 and her mother, Albreda de Lacy, was 31. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Richard fitz Eustace. She died on 21 April 1194, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Skipton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aubrey de Lisours est née en 1128, à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Lisours, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Albreda de Lacy, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Richard fitz Eustace. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1194, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aubrey de Lisours 1128 in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Lisours 31 und ihre Mutter Albreda de Lacy 31. Sie hatte mit Richard fitz Eustace mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. April 1194 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Skipton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Skipton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey de Lisours è nata il nel 1128 nel Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Lisours, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Albreda de Lacy, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Richard fitz Eustace. Morì il 21 aprile 1194, nel Skipton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Skipton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Aubrey de Lisoursが1128年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert Lisoursは31歳，母Albreda de Lacyは31歳であった。彼女はRichard fitz Eustaceとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1194年4月21日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで66歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aubrey de Lisours(이)가 1128년 영국 요르크실르 스플로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Lisours(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Albreda de Lacy(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Richard fitz Eustace(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 4월 21일 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aubrey de Lisours nasceu em 1128, em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Lisours, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Albreda de Lacy, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Richard fitz Eustace. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1194, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aubrey de Lisours родилась в 1128 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Lisours было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Albreda de Lacy, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Richard fitz Eustace. Она умерла 21 апреля 1194 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aubrey de Lisours nació en 1128, en Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Lisours, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Albreda de Lacy, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Richard fitz Eustace. Murió el 21 de abril de 1194, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
